description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage with a job named pages. The pages job runs only on the master branch, uses the default Docker image, and executes the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. It then publishes the resulting public directory as an artifact (paths: public) to GitLab Pages. No additional caches, variables, services, or other stages are required.
